utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan: health_coverage is present, property_coverage is null, travel_coverage is present, additional_services is present, total_budget is present. Now check if each is fully specified with all details including costs. Health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs; the plan lists provider, type, and features but no costs and no explicit mental health coverage—so not fully specified. Property_coverage: null—missing. Travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs; plan lists zones and evacuation but no costs—so not fully specified. Additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs; items listed but no costs—so not fully specified. Total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown; plan includes monthly premium range and an annual cost reduction plus previous monthly spend, but lacks a clear annual total cost; the requirement is for a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown, which is not fully provided—so not fully specified.
